name: kintone-space-writer
description: Draft, prepare, and hand rich articles to kintone Space through a local Ready bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Write and stage rich kintone Space articles.
interface.longDescription: Drafts and refines kintone Space articles, preserves the REST fallback, and stages rich text with inline images for browser-side review through a local Ready bridge.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me draft a kintone Space article.
